name: Joe
bio: I am a developer with 5+ years of experience building and deploying scalable web and mobile applications. I also have 1+ year of experience in the blockchain field.
about:
Hello, My name is Cong. You can call me Joe.
I started as a mobile developer using React Native at the end of 2017. Now I can build a system from scratch, maintain and update it continuously.
I've also been lucky enough to work on several blockchain projects, so I can write smart-contracts and interact with them on networks in a react-env.

companies.description: As a Freelance Full-Stack Developer, I worked for Vietnam, and US clients, always looking for new opportunities to develop myself.
companies.job:
Familiar with time-tracking software such as HubStaff with high activity (>75%) and a flexible work schedule.
Developed and maintained blockchain systems, including the creation of smart contracts and managed them on both testnet and mainnet environments. I've also taken the initiative to build a presale website and an accompanying admin dashboard.

companies.description: At Bright Software Solution, I worked for Swedish, Indian, and European clients, focusing on new technology and being flexible in my work. Some of my key responsibilities and accomplishments include:
companies.job: Developed and maintained a mobile application for teachers to manage students, classes, and CMS to manage employees, sessions, etc. Also in the field of education, I've developed web and mobile applications to help students and teachers interact through video calls and real-time features.

companies.description: During my time at Bright Software Solution, I worked remotely as a Front-End Developer at PrismTech for US clients and their team members in Vietnam.
companies.job: Cooperated with the design team to create a clean and responsive UI, maintained a web application for managing event promotions for schools and communities. Moreover, I've participated in the code review process and provided feedback to team members to ensure code quality and consistency.

companies.description: During my time at Bright Software Solution, I worked onsite as a Full-Stack Developer at Comartek for US clients and their team members in Vietnam.
companies.job: Developed a mobile application and an admin site for sales, introducing products at stores.

companies.description: At Rabiloo, I worked for Japanese clients. During my time here, I:
companies.job:
Developed a mobile application to book cleaners including payments, chat, and map.
Received recognition as one of the Top 5 new employees of the year in 2018.

companies.description: Developed internal projects of the company. As my first company, I've learned a lot, I:
companies.job: Built and maintained mobile application for managing employees, classes, sessions, check-in, and check-out using Wi-Fi connection. Participated in the process of releasing the application to the store.

projects.description: A social place to share random images that submitted by moderators.

projects.description: A place where patients can book appointments at clinics near them.

projects.title: Dance School | School Management

projects.title: Miles at sea
projects.description: Distance tracking and logging, get rewards according to the quests according to the route.

projects.title: Vio Studio
projects.description: The idea is for students to know what is happening and what will happen around them.

projects.title: Osouji | Cleaner booking
projects.description: The idea is a marketplace job related to house cleaning, hotels, payment integration, and directions.
